N159.item: I often find myself making witty remarks to lighten the mood in a room.

N160.item: I aim to hold myself and others to the same standards, without showing favoritism or prejudice.

N161.item: I don't believe that there is anything beyond what we can see and touch in this world.

N162.item: I usually try to do things on my own, even when it would be more effective to work with others.

N163.item: It's hard for me to laugh when I'm in a bad mood.

N166.item: I prioritize reaching fair solutions, even if they are to benefit some before others.

N167.item: I often struggle to contribute to group assignments.

N168.item: I treat all people equally regardless of who they might be.

N177.item: I don't spend time reflecting on the emotional impact of a powerful performance or speech.

N179.item: I focus more on what I lack rather than what I have.

N183.item: I never think before I speak.

N185.item: I have been told that modesty is one of my most notable characteristics.

N188.item: It is important to me to respect decisions made by my group.

N191.item: I have a strong sense of faith that guides my decisions and actions.

N192.item: I rarely think about how my actions affect the world around me.

N193.item: Some people get emotional about beautiful things, but not me.

N196.item: I get easily agitated under stress and pressure.
